title: President Murmu approves increasing Supreme Court Judge strength from 34 to 38
content:
Here's a 3-bullet point summary:

*   President Murmu has approved an increase in the strength of Supreme Court judges.
*   The total number of judges on the Supreme Court is set to rise.
*   The strength will increase from the current 34 judges to 38 judges.

title: Delhi govt cuts VAT on Aviation Turbine Fuel to 7% after Maharashtra amid West Asia war
content:
The Delhi government has reduced the Value Added Tax (VAT) on Aviation Turbine Fuel (ATF) to 7%.
*   This move follows a similar VAT reduction on ATF previously implemented by Maharashtra.
*   The decision comes amid the ongoing conflict in West Asia, which can impact global fuel prices.

title: Tata Electronics, ASML sign MoU to advance chip making ecosystem in India
content:
Tata Electronics and ASML have signed a Memorandum of Understanding (MoU).
*   The agreement aims to advance India's chip manufacturing ecosystem.
*   This collaboration signifies a move to strengthen the semiconductor industry within the country.

title: NEET-UG paper leak: Doctors’ body moves Supreme Court to make NTA a statutory body accountable to Parliament
content:
Following the NEET-UG paper leak, a doctors' body has approached the Supreme Court.
*   Their primary demand is to declare the National Testing Agency (NTA) a statutory body.
*   The objective is to ensure the NTA is directly accountable to Parliament for its operations and conduct.

title: Karjat MLA Rohit Pawar hits out at CJI comment on youngsters
content:
Karjat MLA Rohit Pawar has publicly criticized the Chief Justice of India (CJI).
*   His criticism is directed at a particular comment made by the CJI.
*   The CJI's comment in question specifically concerned youngsters.
